THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 7, 2018 TO PERMIT PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL PAPERS ADDRESSING THE MATERIAL NEWLY SUBMITTED WITH DEFENDANTS' REPLY BRIEF. Off Calendar Dec-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maria G. Diaz, Esq., Allred, Maroko & Goldberg, 323-653-6530 for Plaintiff (by CourtCall);
Eileen P. Kennedy, Esq., Berliner Cohen LLP, 408-286-5800 for Defendants;

Defendants Henry Khachaturian, Fremont Automobile Dealership, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Litigation Proceedings.

An evidentiary hearing will be heard in dept. 306 before Judge Ulmer. Parties to meet and confer as to the hearing date and is to notify the court by way of email.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HENRY KHACHATURIAN, FREMONT AUTOMOBILE DEALERSHIP, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE LITIGATION PROCEEDINGS.

The motion to compel arbitration is CONTINUED to December 7, 2018 to permit plaintiff the opportunity to file supplemental papers addressing the material newly submitted with defendants' reply brief. Plaintiff shall file any and all supplemental papers on or before November 30, 2018.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
